name: Catawba County Schools
districtFact: Catawba County Schools publishes school calendar PDFs with first and last student days, teacher workdays, holidays, early dismissal dates, winter holidays, spring break, and weather make-up notes.

about.title: About Catawba County Schools
about.content: Catawba County Schools serves students in Catawba County, North Carolina. The district calendar lists first and last student days, optional and mandated teacher workdays, holidays, annual leave, elementary-only workdays, early dismissals, and semester dates.

about.title: Which CCS Calendar Should You Use?
about.content: Most families should use the traditional Catawba County Schools calendar. Challenger Early College High School has a separate calendar for 2026-2027, so families in that program should use the district's alternate calendar link.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Catawba County Families
content: Confirm whether your student follows the traditional district calendar or the Challenger Early College calendar.
Add 3-hour early dismissal dates separately because they affect transportation and childcare.
Treat optional, mandated, and elementary-only workdays as student schedule changes when planning care.
Review official CCS updates after winter weather because some workdays are marked as weather make-up dates.

compareIntro: Compare the Catawba County Schools calendar with other North Carolina district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Catawba County Schools calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the official Catawba County Schools traditional calendar PDFs for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Does Catawba County Schools publish an Early College calendar?
districtFaqs.a: Yes. The district publishes a separate Challenger Early College High School calendar for 2026-2027.

districtFaqs.q: Are CCS teacher workdays student holidays?
districtFaqs.a: For family planning, optional and mandated teacher workdays are student no-school dates unless the district announces a make-up change.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify CCS calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Catawba County Schools calendar page and school announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with CCS.
